subcodes.first_line: O servants of the sacred Threshold! Your letter was received and brought the utmost joy, for praise be unto God, in the homeland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بندگان آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید و نهایت سرور رخ داد که الحمد لله در موطن
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
